sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74023" key="o)neiratiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀνειρ-ᾰτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n74023.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in a dream,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φαντάσματα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> </bibl> </cit> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in de An.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg001:209:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">209.4</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg001:212:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">212.14</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0530.tlg006:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Gaur.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
